mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_board
title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT bno, title, content, author, resdate, cnt, fixed FROM tbl_board WHERE bno = #{bno}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_board (title, content, author) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{author})
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_board SET title = #{title}, content = #{content} WHERE bno = #{bno}
UPDATE tbl_board SET cnt = cnt + 1 WHERE bno = #{bno}
UPDATE tbl_board SET fixed = #{fixed} WHERE bno = #{bno}
